title: Minimum Number of K Consecutive Bit Flips
hints: Process the array from left to right; if the current bit is 0, you must flip it immediately using a window starting here.
Use a difference array or a running counter to track the cumulative number of active flips affecting the current position efficiently.
Maintain a variable for the current flip parity; update it when entering or leaving a flip window to decide if a new flip is needed.
